description: Tasks rewritten to match actual generated data

tasks.instruction: Select a shopping-category example, convert it to pretty-printed JSON with 4-space indentation, and download the result as a JSON file.
tasks.name: Select a shopping-category example, convert it to pretty-printed JSON with 4-space indentation, and download the result as a JSON file.
tasks.description: Select a shopping-category example, convert it to pretty-printed JSON with 4-space indentation, and download the result as a JSON file.

tasks.instruction: Choose a profile-category example, convert it to minified JSON, and copy the JSON output to the clipboard.
tasks.name: Choose a profile-category example, convert it to minified JSON, and copy the JSON output to the clipboard.
tasks.description: Choose a profile-category example, convert it to minified JSON, and copy the JSON output to the clipboard.

tasks.instruction: Configure the converter to use 2-space indentation, double-quoted strings, and alphabetically sorted keys by default, then convert a profile-category example and copy its JSON output.
tasks.name: Configure the converter to use 2-space indentation, double-quoted strings, and alphabetically sorted keys by default, then convert a profile-category example and copy its JSON output.
tasks.description: Configure the converter to use 2-space indentation, double-quoted strings, and alphabetically sorted keys by default, then convert a profile-category example and copy its JSON output.

tasks.instruction: Using a shopping-category example, generate JSON, compare pretty versus minified formats with the comparison tool, and keep the minified version as the active output.
tasks.name: Using a shopping-category example, generate JSON, compare pretty versus minified formats with the comparison tool, and keep the minified version as the active output.
tasks.description: Using a shopping-category example, generate JSON, compare pretty versus minified formats with the comparison tool, and keep the minified version as the active output.

tasks.instruction: Create two separate conversions so they both appear in your history, then reopen the older one from the history list, update a status field to a more advanced value, reconvert it, and pin that history entry.
tasks.name: Create two separate conversions so they both appear in your history, then reopen the older one from the history list, update a status field to a more advanced value, reconvert it, and pin that history entry.
tasks.description: Create two separate conversions so they both appear in your history, then reopen the older one from the history list, update a status field to a more advanced value, reconvert it, and pin that history entry.

tasks.instruction: Filter the examples list to the configuration category, pick one configuration example, convert it to JSON with 4-space indentation, and download it as a JSON file.
tasks.name: Filter the examples list to the configuration category, pick one configuration example, convert it to JSON with 4-space indentation, and download it as a JSON file.
tasks.description: Filter the examples list to the configuration category, pick one configuration example, convert it to JSON with 4-space indentation, and download it as a JSON file.

tasks.instruction: Switch the site to dark mode, enable auto-conversion while typing, enter a small task with a future due date in YAML on the main converter so it auto-converts, then turn auto-convert off again from the converter.
tasks.name: Switch the site to dark mode, enable auto-conversion while typing, enter a small task with a future due date in YAML on the main converter so it auto-converts, then turn auto-convert off again from the converter.
tasks.description: Switch the site to dark mode, enable auto-conversion while typing, enter a small task with a future due date in YAML on the main converter so it auto-converts, then turn auto-convert off again from the converter.

tasks.instruction: On the main converter, work with a project-category example that includes a project name and owner, convert it to JSON, and generate and copy a shareable link for this conversion.
tasks.name: On the main converter, work with a project-category example that includes a project name and owner, convert it to JSON, and generate and copy a shareable link for this conversion.
tasks.description: On the main converter, work with a project-category example that includes a project name and owner, convert it to JSON, and generate and copy a shareable link for this conversion.

tasks.instruction: Open a general-category example that contains multiple YAML documents separated by document markers, configure the converter to combine the documents into a single JSON array, convert it, and copy the JSON output.
tasks.name: Open a general-category example that contains multiple YAML documents separated by document markers, configure the converter to combine the documents into a single JSON array, convert it, and copy the JSON output.
tasks.description: Open a general-category example that contains multiple YAML documents separated by document markers, configure the converter to combine the documents into a single JSON array, convert it, and copy the JSON output.
